# Datawise

> Datawise is a Portuguese AI and Data Science consultancy that combines artificial
> intelligence with business knowledge to turn a company's data and processes into
> growth engines. Based in Elvas, Portugal, it delivers high-impact MVPs in 3–6 weeks.

Datawise builds custom AI solutions for companies: predictive models, workflow
automation, competitive intelligence, operational optimization, intelligent
document classification, and data structuring/normalization. Content is available
in Portuguese (default) and English.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.datawise.pt/): Company overview, services, success cases and process.
- [Blog](https://www.datawise.pt/blog): Articles and guides on data science, machine learning and AI, plus client success stories.

## Services

- [Predictive Models](https://www.datawise.pt/predictive-models): Models that anticipate trends and behaviors (churn, sales forecasting, preventive maintenance).
- [Competitive Intelligence](https://www.datawise.pt/competitive-intelligence): Automated collection and analysis of competitor, market and public-sentiment data.
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.datawise.pt/workflow-automation): Automated orchestration of complex cross-department processes.
- [Operational Optimization](https://www.datawise.pt/operational-optimization): Route, team and resource optimization for operational efficiency.

## Contact

- Email: geral@datawise.pt
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/datawise-dev/
